endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Network/trafficmanagerprofiles
endpoints.description: Lists all Traffic Manager profiles within a subscription.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/trafficmanagerprofiles
endpoints.description: Lists all Traffic Manager profiles within a resource group.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/trafficmanagerprofiles/{profileName}
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{PROFILENAME}} with a real profilename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/trafficmanagerprofiles/{profileName}
endpoints.description: Create or update a Traffic Manager profile.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{PROFILENAME}} with a real profilename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/trafficmanagerprofiles/{profileName}
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{PROFILENAME}} with a real profilename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{PROFILENAME}} with a real profilename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/trafficmanagerprofiles/{profileName}/{endpointType}/{endpointName}
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PROFILENAME}} with a real profilename. Replace {{ENDPOINTTYPE}} with a real endpointtype. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ENDPOINTNAME}} with a real endpointname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/trafficmanagerprofiles/{profileName}/{endpointType}/{endpointName}
endpoints.description: Create or update a Traffic Manager endpoint.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PROFILENAME}} with a real profilename. Replace {{ENDPOINTTYPE}} with a real endpointtype. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ENDPOINTNAME}} with a real endpointname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.
